texto: Isn't that the great thing about Christmas? You get a lot of respite, time to recharge your batteries, time with family without too much else happening anywhere else in the world, time to focus on the people you love and the activities that you enjoy, time to exercise, to read.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Wayne Swan que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Isn't that the great thing about Christmas? You get a lot of respite, time to recharge your batte…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, love, family, com foco em natal e family.
